title: ContrastAPI Security Tools
author: UPinar
detailMarkdown:
# ContrastAPI Security Tools

41 security intelligence tools over remote MCP: CVE, KEV, CWE, EPSS, domain audit, IP threat reports, IOC enrichment, dependency scanning, MITRE ATLAS AI/ML attacks, and MITRE D3FEND defenses. Free tier: 100 credits/hour, no API key required. Streamable-HTTP transport.

## Install
```bash
claude mcp add --transport http contrastapi https://api.contrastcyber.com/mcp/
```

## Config
```json
{
  "contrastapi": {
    "url": "https://api.contrastcyber.com/mcp/",
    "transport": "http"
  }
}
```

## Usage
claude mcp add --transport http contrastapi https://api.contrastcyber.com/mcp/
claude mcp list
seoTitle: ContrastAPI MCP Server for Claude Security Research
seoDescription: Use ContrastAPI with Claude for 41 MCP security tools covering CVE, KEV, CWE, EPSS, MITRE ATLAS, D3FEND, domain audit, and IOC enrichment.
